name: daye-agent-toolkit
description: Daye's personal agent toolkit - CC plugins for life management, finance, dev tools, media

plugins.name: life-management
plugins.description: 건강/생활/코칭 관련 스킬 모음 — health-tracker, life-coach, pantry-manager, saju-manse

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: 금융/소비 관련 스킬 모음 — spending-manager, investment-manager, banksalad-import

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: 개발 워크플로우 스킬 + 훅 — codex-cli, gemini-cli, correction-memory, enforce, work-digest, self-profile, dashboard-content-design, stop-slop-kr

plugins.name: media-fetch
plugins.description: 외부 콘텐츠 수집 — reddit-fetch, youtube-fetch, news-brief
